name: grok-codex
description: Delegate coding tasks and read-only code reviews from Codex to Grok Build.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding and code review to Grok Build.
interface.longDescription: Run Grok Build as a companion coding agent from Codex for implementation, diagnosis, and read-only review workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Grok to investigate this difficult coding problem.
Ask Grok to review my current working tree.
Run an adversarial Grok review of this branch.
